groupDescriptions.workInProgress: Saved records that are not finalized yet.
groupDescriptions.finalizedResults: Completed or active figures in the current reporting window.
groupDescriptions.upcomingDates: Events and contracts near the current business date.

metricDescriptions.todayEventCount: Events scheduled for the current business date.
metricDescriptions.next7DayEventCount: Events scheduled in the next seven days.
metricDescriptions.draftTalentKpiCount: KPI records saved but not finalized.
metricDescriptions.finalizedTalentKpiCount30d: KPI records finalized in the dashboard reporting window.
metricDescriptions.draftRevenueEntryCount: Revenue entries saved but not finalized.
metricDescriptions.finalizedRevenueAmount30d: Revenue finalized in the dashboard reporting window.
metricDescriptions.reconciledRevenueAmount30d: Revenue entries marked as reconciled in the reporting window.
metricDescriptions.draftSettlementCount: Settlement records saved but not finalized.
metricDescriptions.finalizedSettlementAmount30d: Settlement value finalized in the reporting window.
metricDescriptions.expiringContractCount30d: Active contracts with an end date in the dashboard expiry window.
metricDescriptions.staleTalentKpiDraftCount: Drafts that may need review because they have been open for too long.
metricDescriptions.staleRevenueDraftCount: Drafts that may need review because they have been open for too long.
metricDescriptions.staleSettlementDraftCount: Drafts that may need review because they have been open for too long.

states.loadErrorMessage: Please retry loading the dashboard snapshot.
states.refreshErrorInline: Could not refresh dashboard. Showing the last loaded data.
states.emptyMessage: The backend returned no dashboard snapshot payload.
